theory.canonical_statement: ID5111 records According Fibonacci Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `TZPID_exports\math_methods\all_edit_equation_arc_compact\entries.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ according to \begin{equation} \lim_{n \to \infty} \frac{F_{n+1}}{F_n} = \varphi = \frac{1 + \sqrt{5}}{2}. \end{equation} A closed-form expression (Binet form) for the $
